full_text:
Huang Kui 黃奎
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huang Kui (黃奎). Sent to lure Ma Teng into a trap, he instead aided Ma Teng in trying to kill Cao Cao. Huang Kui is a fictional character. Huang Kui was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and Ma Teng.
